ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crew assigned to the film */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the film */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the film */,
  "box_office" REAL /* Total box office revenue generated by the film */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the film's plot */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the film's trailer */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Status of the film's production (e.g., pre-production, production, post-production) */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the film's poster */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crews ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards received by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crews" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member in the production */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the crew member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the crew (e.g., production, art, sound) */,
  "head_crew_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head crew member for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "sub_genres" TEXT /* List of sub-genres within the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the actor is associated with */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role played by the actor in the film */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the actor for the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audience_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attached film */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Rating score given by the audience (0-10) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text review provided by the audience */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audience_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production schedule */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being produced */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Planned start date of the production */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Planned end date of the production */,
  "production_stage" TEXT /* Current stage of production (e.g., pre-production, production, post-production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_schedules_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film associated with the budget */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Total budget amount allocated */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total expenses incurred during production */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the film */,
  "profit" REAL /* Total profit made by the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing" (
  "marketing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film associated with the marketing strategy */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Description of the marketing strategy used */,
  "budget_assigned" REAL /* Budget assigned for the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marketing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the distribution company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the distributor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_distributors" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being distributed */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor handling the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film in the territory */,
  "territory" TEXT /* Territory where the film is being distributed (e.g., USA, Europe, Asia) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., producer, director, crew) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Picture, Best Director) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew the member belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member in the production */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the crew member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_members_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crews ("crew_id")
)
